# Generated by tools/m10_final_century.py --write; AD 400-476 currents.
namespace = antq_m10_final

# Crossing of the Rhine; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=XAA
antq_m10_final.5000 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_final.5000.title
	desc = antq_m10_final.5000.desc
	outcome = neutral
	fire_only_once = yes
	image = "gfx/interface/illustrations/event/antq_radagaisus_rhine.dds"
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_final.5000.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_stability = stability_weak_penalty
	}
}

		tag = XAA
		from = 410.1.1
		to = 411.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_final.5002.a
		historical_option = yes
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_bonus

}

# Visigothic Settlement; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=XAA
antq_m10_final.5003 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_final.5003.title
	desc = antq_m10_final.5003.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAA
		from = 418.1.1
		to = 419.1.1
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_final.5003.a
		historical_option = yes
		# CAM-GAUL: Aquitanian/Toulouse local-mesh proxy; see ASSUMPTIONS.md.
		location:toulouse = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = VSG
				change_country_name = VSG
				change_country_adjective = VSG
				change_country_color = map_VSG
				change_country_flag = VSG
				change_culture = culture:antq_gothic
				change_religion = religion:antq_early_christianity
				change_government_type = government_type:monarchy
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_regional_kingship
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:cognatic_primogeniture
			}
			add_core = c:VSG
		}
		every_owned_location = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					this = location:toulouse
					this = location:castelnaudary
					this = location:lavaur
					this = location:verdun_sur_garonne
					this = location:villemur
					this = location:bordeaux
					this = location:libourne
				}
			}
			change_location_owner = c:VSG
			add_core = c:VSG
		}
		add_stability = stability_mild_penalty
	}
}

# Vandal Conquest of Africa; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=XAA
antq_m10_final.5004 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_final.5004.title
	desc = antq_m10_final.5004.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_final.5004.a
		historical_option = yes
		# CAM-VANDAL: Tunis is the installed local proxy for Carthage; see ASSUMPTIONS.md.
		location:tunis = {
			create_country_from_location = {
				define_unique_country_tag = VND
				change_country_name = VND
				change_country_adjective = VND
				change_country_color = map_VND
				change_country_flag = VND
				change_culture = culture:antq_vandalic
				change_religion = religion:antq_early_christianity
				change_government_type = government_type:monarchy
				add_reform = government_reform:antq_regional_kingship
				change_heir_selection = heir_selection:cognatic_primogeniture
			}
			add_core = c:VND
		}
		every_owned_location = {
			limit = {
				OR = {
					this = location:tunis
					this = location:nabeul
					this = location:hammamet
					this = location:el_fahs
					this = location:zaghouan
				}
			}
			change_location_owner = c:VND
			add_core = c:VND
		}
		add_stability = stability_mild_penalty
	}
}

# Odoacer's Deposition; ANTIQVITAS master plan §9; recipient=XAA
antq_m10_final.5012 = {
	type = country_event
	title = antq_m10_final.5012.title
	desc = antq_m10_final.5012.desc
	outcome = positive
	fire_only_once = yes
	dynamic_historical_event = {
		tag = XAA
		from = 476.1.1
		to = 476.9.4
		monthly_chance = 100
	}
	option = {
		name = antq_m10_final.5012.a
		historical_option = yes
		# OUP-ODO: terminal Western-Roman identity adapter; campaign end remains 476.9.4.
		change_tag_cosmetic = { tag = ODO }
		add_prestige = prestige_mild_penalty
	}
}
